Home.title: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.
Home.description: Looking for a starting point or more instructions? Head over to <templates>Templates</templates> or the <learning>Learning</learning> center.

Landing.heroSubtitle: Build Your Next App with Confidence
Landing.feature1Desc: Built on Next.js 16 with React 19 compiler for maximum performance out of the box.
Landing.feature2Desc: Enterprise-grade authentication powered by Clerk with zero configuration overhead.
Landing.feature3Desc: Polished UI components from shadcn with full i18n support via next-intl.
Landing.storyDesc: Hucky is a production-ready Next.js template that combines the best tools in the ecosystem. From authentication to internationalization, every piece is carefully chosen so you can focus on building your product.
Landing.ctaDesc: Start your next project with a solid foundation. Everything you need, nothing you don't.
